name: Hair Trigger
title: Improvised Enhancement

abilities.name: Plink!
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 1.

abilities.name: Run and Gun
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (missile) actions instead of (melee) actions.

extraction_notes: This is an Upgrade card, not a stat card, so standard stat fields (df, wp, sp, sz, health) are not applicable
Upgrade cards do not have characteristics or keywords in the normal sense
This appears to be a generic upgrade card back template with only decorative imagery (two stylized boar/pig head designs)
No stat lines, actions, or game text visible on this card back
This is the reverse side of Malifaux upgrade cards, not a playable stat card
